Records.description: The observatory graph $(3,1,1)$: 4 vertices, 5 edges, $L=2$, 4 external legs. Two trivalent vertices joined by a chain of 3 edges and by two single edges (a double edge). Graph polynomials in eq:UVF311. Proposition p:X: for $D \geq 4$, $\mathrm{Gr}^W_3 H^3(X_{(3,1,1);D};\mathbb{Q}) = H^1(E)$ for an elliptic curve depending on kinematics; for $D \leq 2$ the cohomology is mixed Tate. In $D=4$ the differential form lives on the complement of $U \cup F$; $H^3$ of the reducible hypersurface also has an elliptic-curve contribution. The order-4 Picard-Fuchs operator factors as $L_2 L_1^a L_1^b$ with the order-2 factor elliptic.
Records.method: graph hypersurface, quadric fibration, blowup, mixed Hodge structure, Picard-Fuchs, Griffiths-Dwork
Records.location: Section sec:Motive311 (Propositions p:X, p:Y, p:Z, p:observatory); Figure fig:observatory; eq. eq:UVF311

Records.authors: Fevola, C., Mizera, S., Telen, S.
Records.description: Landau singularities of the double-edged box computed via principal Landau determinants.
